description_long: This is a tall, slender bottle filled with a bright red liquid, likely juice, and sealed with a small screw cap. The bottle is made of a translucent material, probably plastic or glass, and features a colorful label that wraps around its body. The front label displays vibrant images of various fruits, suggesting a mixed fruit juice flavor, and includes a prominent brand logo in bold, stylized text. The back and side labels contain detailed product information, including a nutritional information panel and barcode. The cap is multicolored, with a green and yellow pattern, and appears to be made of plastic. The overall design is visually appealing and intended to attract attention in a retail or urban environment.
description: A tall, slender bottle of red juice with a colorful fruit-themed label and a multicolored screw cap. The packaging is visually vibrant and features detailed product information.
description_view_0: The back of the bottle shows a green-bordered label with text and a barcode, and the cap is mostly green.
description_view_1: This side view reveals more of the label's text and a partial fruit illustration, with the cap showing a yellow and green pattern.
description_view_2: The front view displays the main label with a bold brand logo and vivid images of assorted fruits, and the cap has a yellow top.
description_view_3: This side view shows the label's text-heavy section and a glimpse of the fruit illustration, with the cap mostly green and white.
attribute_juice_flavor_illustration: assorted fruits including orange, apple, and grapes
